_meta.note: VERBATIM transcription of copy/copy_signals_v2.txt + copy/copy_signals_linkedin.txt (D3, HANDOFF_2026-07-15_scoring_two_channel.md). No copy rewrites — Leo reviews this JSON diff against the two .txt files once before it is used to send anything. Bodies keep the source's literal {variable} and OR-choice bracket placeholders (e.g. '{appointed new CEO / named new leadership}') where the source itself left them unresolved — copyEngine.mjs / a human must resolve those, this file does not invent a resolution.
_meta.linkedin_resynced_at: 2026-07-17 — li_connection_note/li_first_message fields below re-transcribed from copy_signals_linkedin.txt v2 (Leo's review comments on v1 folded in: no generic credentials line in connection notes, {relevant_case} manual-fill variable added to every first message, qualifying-question CTA instead of direct call pitch, varied openers instead of literal 'Thanks for connecting' everywhere). Email variants (A/B/C) below are UNCHANGED — still v1/copy_signals_v2.txt, not yet adapted to the same principles. Leo reviews the LinkedIn rewrite before this is used in a live queue build.
_meta.sender_email_channel: Leo (not Philippe) except HIRING_SURGE variant A, which is voiced as Philippe per the source
_meta.sender_linkedin_channel: Philippe, first person, per copy_signals_linkedin.txt A9

linkedin_mechanics.connection_note_optional: if accept rate with a note drops, send without one (A/B decided by Leo from real data) — copy_signals_linkedin.txt «MEHANIKA»
linkedin_mechanics.first_message_timing: day the connection is accepted, not later
linkedin_mechanics.reply_handling: any reply (including 'thanks, not relevant') is screenshotted/forwarded to Leo — Philippe does not reply himself
linkedin_mechanics.inmail_eligible_rule: T1 only, connection pending >7 days with <14 days left in the event window — text = that type's li_first_message with connection_note_first_line replaced by "{first_name}, reaching out directly as the timing seemed too relevant to wait —"

_meta.cold_call_universal_script_ru: "Hi {first_name}, это Leo — звоню потому что я видел [сигнал]. Я представляю Philippe Bosquillon — food exec search, {market_focus}, 30 лет в индустрии сам. Он размещает такие роли как {role/context} за 2-3 недели. Имеет смысл познакомить вас с Philippe?"
_meta.sequence_routing_note: copy_signals_v2.txt БЛОК 5's step-count table (Sonnet must not treat as ground truth over the literal SEQUENCE block in each section — e.g. it claims HIRING_STALE is 4-step 0/4/10/18 but section 1D's actual SEQUENCE is 3-step 0/3/8; the literal section wins).
